problem_text_cn: 1457 测量液氮的比汽化热。[可供仪器和用具] 物理天平、量热器、秒钟（或秒表）、水银温度计（0～50℃，分度值0.1℃）、铜样品（小棒状）、水柱瓦瓶（外壳用聚苯乙烯泡沫塑料绝热）、液氮及保温瓶等。[要求] (1) 写出实验原理及公式；(2) 写出实验方法；(3) 测量并计算液氮的比汽化热值。
problem_text_en: 1457 Measure the specific vaporization heat of liquid nitrogen. [Available instruments and tools] Physical balance, calorimeter, second clock (or stopwatch), mercury thermometer (0～50℃, division value 0.1℃), copper sample (small rod shape), water column Dewar (shell insulated with polystyrene foam), liquid nitrogen and thermos, etc. [Requirements] (1) Write down the experimental principle and formula; (2) Write down the experimental method; (3) Measure and calculate the specific vaporization heat value of liquid nitrogen.
img_cn: 图1457_1：M-t关系曲线及数据处理
图1457_2：液氮比汽化热实验装置
img_en: Fig. 1457_1: M-t relationship curve and data processing
Fig. 1457_2: Experimental device for measuring specific vaporization heat of liquid nitrogen
problem_solution_cn: 【核心思路】铜样品放热使液氮汽化，$m_N L = (m_wc_w + m_ac_a + m_cc_c + h_t)(\theta_2 - \theta_3) + m_bc_b(\theta_1 - \theta_3)$，故$L = \frac{1}{m_N}[(m_wc_w + m_ac_a + m_cc_c + h_t)(\theta_2 - \theta_3) + m_bc_b(\theta_1 - \theta_3)]$。代入数据：$m_N = 4.20\ \mathrm{g}$，$m_w = 63.64\ \mathrm{g}$，$m_a = 27.87\ \mathrm{g}$，$m_c = 6.51\ \mathrm{g}$，$m_b = 12.53\ \mathrm{g}$，$c_w = 4.188\ \mathrm{J/g \cdot ^\circ C}$，$c_a = 0.900\ \mathrm{J/g \cdot ^\circ C}$，$c_c = 0.384\ \mathrm{J/g \cdot ^\circ C}$，$c_b = 0.384\ \mathrm{J/g \cdot ^\circ C}$，$h_t = 1.7\ \mathrm{J/^\circ C}$，$\theta_1 = 16.05\ \mathrm{^\circ C}$，$\theta_2 = 15.10\ \mathrm{^\circ C}$，$\theta_3 = 12.35\ \mathrm{^\circ C}$，得$L = 197.9 \times 10^3\ \mathrm{J/kg}$，与标准值$199.6 \times 10^3\ \mathrm{J/kg}$百分差为0.9%。
problem_solution_en: 【Core Idea】Copper sample releases heat to vaporize liquid nitrogen: $m_N L = (m_wc_w + m_ac_a + m_cc_c + h_t)(\theta_2 - \theta_3) + m_bc_b(\theta_1 - \theta_3)$, so $L = \frac{1}{m_N}[(m_wc_w + m_ac_a + m_cc_c + h_t)(\theta_2 - \theta_3) + m_bc_b(\theta_1 - \theta_3)]$. Substituting data: $m_N = 4.20\ \mathrm{g}$, $m_w = 63.64\ \mathrm{g}$, $m_a = 27.87\ \mathrm{g}$, $m_c = 6.51\ \mathrm{g}$, $m_b = 12.53\ \mathrm{g}$, $c_w = 4.188\ \mathrm{J/g \cdot ^\circ C}$, $c_a = 0.900\ \mathrm{J/g \cdot ^\circ C}$, $c_c = 0.384\ \mathrm{J/g \cdot ^\circ C}$, $c_b = 0.384\ \mathrm{J/g \cdot ^\circ C}$, $h_t = 1.7\ \mathrm{J/^\circ C}$, $\theta_1 = 16.05\ \mathrm{^\circ C}$, $\theta_2 = 15.10\ \mathrm{^\circ C}$, $\theta_3 = 12.35\ \mathrm{^\circ C}$, get $L = 197.9 \times 10^3\ \mathrm{J/kg}$, with a percentage difference of 0.9% from the standard value $199.6 \times 10^3\ \mathrm{J/kg}$.
problem_answer: 液氮的比汽化热：$\boldsymbol{197.9 \times 10^3\ \mathrm{J/kg}}$；与标准值百分差：$\boldsymbol{0.9\%}$；测量关键：作图法消除自然汽化的系统误差。
